description:
As a user
  I want to be able to purchase products
  So that I can complete my shopping experience

elements.name: Complete purchase flow - Login, add product, checkout, place order

steps.name: the user is on the login page
the user logs in with valid user credentials
the user should be logged in successfully
the user adds the product to cart
the product should be added successfully
the user navigates to cart
the product should be in the cart
the user proceeds to checkout
the checkout page should be displayed
the user selects the checkout country
the country should be selected
the user places the order
the order confirmation message should be displayed

elements.name: Verify products are displayed after login

steps.name: the user is on the login page
the user logs in with valid user credentials
the user should be logged in successfully
the user fetches all products on the current page
at least one product should be displayed
the product names should be visible
the user is on the login page
the user logs in with valid user credentials
the user should be logged in successfully
the user adds the following products to cart from test data:
all products should be added successfully

name: E-Commerce Purchase Flow
